{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321122902D3BB3FC981A734EE513B"}"},"total":58},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614731624233812761","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"抛开脑子不要注重细节的话，这个文够爽呀，爽得又刚好，爽得让人一直追着看，不会无聊，又好笑，这种爽文个人不喜欢歪嘴龙傲天好多女人开后宫那种，不要谈情说爱，也不要整天带一堆小弟，爽就是了，作者大大不要断更呀，快点写，看着心情都愉快","text_exts":[{"e":59,"s":56,"text":"龙傲天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177406734234EE513B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227614731624233812761%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227552552096805948440%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772946147,"group_id":"7552552096805948440","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"浪漫一生又何况","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8hgm48OfoYtYzmSPsgmdU+iOjrBh5AzAPdKHZeFg6iq","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2223639679470640","user_name":"阳光的向日葵🌻🌻"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2223639679470640","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7552552096805948440","book_info":{"abstract":"【都市】【系统】【校园】【神豪】
陈浪，以优异成绩考入东海大学。
入学报到途中竟激活系统，本以为是大喜之事，可系统却让自己伪装富二代？
陈浪看了看自己的一身行头，一脸懵。
自己？自己拍个照，穷酸样都能溢出屏幕，还装富二代？
叫自己伪装就算了，连新手奖励也不给？
装个蛋！
可是，当自己打车前往学校，打到劳斯莱斯后，误会就产生了。
“坐劳斯莱斯来报到，这绝对是顶级富二代！”
然而，面对舍友的“利诱”，校花的“威逼”，同学们的“吹捧”，还有系统的“奖励”......
陈浪彻底摆烂了。
“随你们怎么想吧，没错，本少就是富二代！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c718dcf42da87f0eb9e07bc9cba20c8e","author":"牛腩地瓜","author_id":"","book_id":"7552552096805948440","book_name":"贫农三代，系统非要我装富二代","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#483030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7583317435898397208","read_count":"138656","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"205707"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.7","serial_count":"86","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,神豪,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5746c9f49bcb6a6ad14600daec350215~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779251342&x-signature=zmcqzPPBgEVc%2FYZTmhNt0SZV%2Fms%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4444678063144643","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"63"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321122902D3BB3FC981A734EE513B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6132,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4138},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick"
